signals.headline: RLUSD Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout Confirmed on XRP Ledger and Ethereum | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
RLUSD Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout Confirmed on XRP Ledger and Ethereum | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The official full-scale rollout of Ripple USD (RLUSD) across the XRP Ledger and Ethereum was announced as of April 13, 2026, driving massive capital influx into the XRP ecosystem amid heightened institutional adoption.[4]

signals.headline: XRP ETF Approvals Entering Final Stage | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
XRP ETF Approvals Entering Final Stage | YES | MED confidence**  
XRP ETF approvals have reached the final stage following the SEC resolution, with expectations of imminent launches fueling institutional interest, though not yet fully confirmed.[4][5]

signals.headline: SEC Legal Battle with Ripple Officially Resolved | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC Legal Battle with Ripple Officially Resolved | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The long-standing SEC legal battle against Ripple is now officially over, removing a major overhang and boosting XRP's momentum as of April 13, 2026.[4]
